series_metadata.series_title: Gross Casino Revenue Tax Return, Supporting Reports & Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, the daily tax return, gross casino revenue report, weekly reports reflecting amounts paid or reported by casino operators, and daily reconciliation report received by the Excise/Energy Tax Division by the Treasurer of State.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 4 yrs from end of calendar year in which return was received or issue was closed. ; Electronic: 4 yrs from end of calendar year in which return was received or issue was closed
